menu module: main menu/config UI and sub-dialogs

ai_solver: AI trajectory solver start
generate_wind: formula rand(max_wind)-max_wind/4 range [-max/4 +3max/4); nested doubling 8% total

apply_viscosity2: second viscosity application site (trajectory module)
main_menu: far address 34ED:1870; called from game loop at 0x2A850
weapon_fire_dispatch: call word far [bx+0x1200] — dispatches weapon behavior fn ptr
equip_init: initializes equipment/weapon shop; marks Laser/Plasma as accessories (NULL fn ptr)
apogee_detect: compares velocity sign against stored last-sign; triggers MIRV split on flip
sub_warhead_damage: damage=(radius-dist)*100/radius capped at 110

main_menu_right_panel: renders terrain preview and title on right side of main menu
targeting_line: laser sight display function; seg 2F76:01C1
targeting_pixel_cb: per-pixel callback — checks bounds/cavern; Laser blends Plasma overwrites
dialog_draw: dialog system render function at seg 3F19:024C
dialog_run: dialog system event loop at seg 3F19:045D
MAX_WIND: maximum wind speed (default 200; slider 5-500); per-turn clamp uses +-this
MKT_SENSITIVITY: market price adjustment multiplier = 0.05 (float64); NOT air viscosity
layout_mode: 0=spacious(25px rows) 1=compact(17px rows); same font both modes
highlight_color: UI highlight/selected-item color (pal 200 dynamic player color)
HUD_Y: HUD Y position
player_struct_base: far ptr to player struct array; stride 0x6C (108 bytes)
tank_struct_base: tank/sub struct array base; stride 0xCA (202 bytes)
weapon_struct_base: weapon struct array; stride 0x34 (52 bytes); index 2=Baby Missile
stack_limit: stack overflow check limit (compared in __stkchk)
sub_radius_table: [MIRV=20 DeathsHead=35] sub-warhead blast radius by param
sub_count_table: [MIRV=5 DeathsHead=9] sub-warhead count by param
setup_player_palette: sets VGA 0-79 = player colors (8 per player); slot 5 mod 8 = white(63

sky_gradient_base_index: base VGA palette index for sky gradient = 0x50=80; used as color in hline/vline calls for terrain borders
compute_item_percentage: returns floor(struct[0x96]*100.0/ptr[0x02]) capped 1-99 unless exactly full=100; DS:0x5830=100.0f
check_heavy_shield_energy: returns inventory[D564=HeavyShield]*10 + struct[0xAA]; total shield energy
check_shield_type_active: returns 1 if struct[0] > 1 (active shield type); 0 if dead/none
HUD_HEAVY_SHIELD_IDX: Heavy Shield weapon index (set by equipInit); used in Widget 7 energy calc
HUD_SUPER_MAG_IDX: Super Mag weapon index (set by equipInit); used in Widget 6 icon
FLOAT32_100: 100.0f constant used in percentage calculation at 0x31D7F
mkt_init_defaults: sets mkt_cost=base_price EMAs=0.1 for all 48 weapons
mkt_load: fopen("scorch.mkt"
column3: rb); validates version=2 count=48; clamps prices to [base*0.1

mkt_update: per-round EMA-based market price adjustment; alpha=0.7 sensitivity=0.05
buy_weapon_inc_sold: inc [bx+0x1214] — increments weapon sold_qty for market demand tracking
FREE_MARKET: config toggle (0=disabled 1=enabled); gates MKT load/save/update
MKT_ALPHA: EMA smoothing factor = 0.7 (float64)
MKT_INIT: default EMA init value = 0.1 (float64); also minimum price ratio for validation
MKT_SIGNAL_DIV: price signal divisor = 10.0 (float32)
NUM_PLAYERS: total player count (runtime); used to normalize demand in market update
WEAPON_COUNT: total weapons in economy = 48
terrain_gen_main: enter; alloc height/bitmap arrays; 7-way switch on TERRAIN_TYPE(DS:5110)
setTerrainPixel: 7-way switch on TERRAIN_TYPE; jump table at CS:0x16E5 (reloc-corrupted)
drawColumn: per-column renderer; type0=vline(120); else per-pixel via setTerrainPixel loop
height_random_walk: momentum-based random walk kernel; flat_chance/bump_chance params
TERRAIN_TYPE: 0=Flat 1=Slope 2=Rolling 3=MTN 4=V-Shaped 5=Castle 6=Cavern
screen_height: EF38-EF40 (total playfield height)
bitmap_col_bytes: (EF3A+9)/8+1 bytes per bitmap column
depth_divisor: type3=depth/this -> VGA 130+; type4: 2 or 3 (based on screen width)
height_array_ptr: far ptr to per-row color index array; size=(EF3A+1)*2
bitmap_array_ptr: far ptr to per-column bitmap arrays; for textured terrain types
aux_array_ptr: far ptr to per-row aux values; type2=rand(32000) texture; type3=depth gradient
scanned_mtn_flag: 1=.MTN scanned mountain data loaded; 0/-1=use procedural or alloc failed
terrain_cached_flag: 1=reuse cached terrain from previous round; 0=regenerate
cached_terrain_type: last terrain_type used; compared to skip redundant regeneration
HOSTILE_ENVIRONMENT: config flag (0=Off 1=On); enables lightning/meteor random events and hit damage
is_castle_terrain: 1 when terrain_type==5 (Castle); 0 otherwise
alloc_talk_struct: malloc(6); zeroes count field
free_talk_data: frees all strdup'd lines + pointer array; flag bit0 → also free struct
get_random_line: returns lines[random(count)] or empty string if count==0
load_talk_file: fopen(filename
column3: rt); 2-pass: count lines then strdup each; max 80 chars/line (fgets buf=0x50)

column2: load_talk_files: loads attack(DS:ECD8→DS:CC8E) + die(DS:ED18→DS:CC94); sets DS:0x0128=1
show_die_comment: tank death handler; get_random_line(&die_talk) → display_talk_bubble
show_attack_comment: tank fire handler; 2% random-player taunt; get_random_line(&attack_talk) → display_talk_bubble
display_talk_bubble: checks TALKING_TANKS!=0 & TALK_PROB!=0; rolls random(100)<TALK_PROB; renders bordered speech bubble; delays TALK_DELAY ticks

talk_delay: busy-waits TALK_DELAY ticks via BIOS timer (int 1Ah)

die_filename: default "talk2.cfg" from DIE_COMMENTS= config
talk_files_loaded: set to 1 after load_talk_files() runs
pcx_filename: "scorch.pcx" — optional user-provided background image
pcx_display: B-key handler — push ds/offset; fg_pcxopen; fg_pcxhead; fg_pcximage; no error check
play_loop_switch_table: 80 word entries at CS:0x05DB; index = (scancode-2)*2; dispatches gameplay input

FALLING_DELAY: animation speed for falling tanks; default 10

parachute_deploy_check: if tank[0x2C] > 0; call 0x202F6 to check deploy condition
parachute_set_deployed: tank[0x0C] = 1; flash color RGB(63

fall_damage_on_check: cmp DAMAGE_TANKS_ON_IMPACT
damage_tank: args(tank_far_ptr
column4: flag); if flag>0: subtract HP; if amount==0: no-op

column2: compute_sell_refund: refund = floor(qty * price * SELL_FACTOR / bundle); factor=0.8 normal; 0.65 free market
SELL_FACTOR: float64 0.8 — normal sell refund = 80% of per-unit price
SELL_FACTOR_MKT: float64 0.65 — free market sell refund = 65% of per-unit price
ELASTIC: wall type enum (0=None 1=Wrap 2=Padded 3=Rubber 4=Spring 5=Concrete 6=Random 7=Erratic)
wall_type_dispatch: switch on DS:5154 — None(offscreen)/Concrete(explode)/Wrap/bounce types
wall_bounce_coeff_select: Rubber→DS:1D34(-1.0) Padded→DS:1D3C(-0.5) Spring→DS:1D44(-2.0)
wall_random_resolve: Random/Erratic resolve via random(6) → types 0-5
BOUNCE_RUBBER: float64 -1.0 — perfect reflection (no energy loss)
BOUNCE_PADDED: float64 -0.5 — half velocity reflection
BOUNCE_SPRING: float64 -2.0 — doubled velocity reflection
funky_bomb_handler: direct hit + spawn sub-bombs; shield hit (damage=10) blocks sub-bomb spawn
funky_bomb_spawn_sub_bombs: count=random(6)+5; parent explosion radius=20; sub-bomb radius=(random(10)+15)*EXPLOSION_SCALE
funky_bomb_parent_explosion: hardcoded radius=20
funky_bomb_sub_radius: (random(10)+15) × DS:0x50DA (EXPLOSION_SCALE float)
EXPLOSION_SCALE_FLOAT: runtime float64
